.file-embed.background: rgb(212, 212, 212) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title::before.background: rgb(220, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.8), rgba(19, 166, 240, 0.9)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::after.background: rgb(8, 145, 178) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
